Class SidebarBuilder

java.lang.Object
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.helpers.SidebarBuilder
public class SidebarBuilder extends Object
Builds the shared sidebar structure used by DashboardController and AnalyticsController.

Both sidebars share:

  • App title (via AppUtils.SideBarTitle()).
  • Nav section with label and nav buttons.
  • Optional extra content slot (e.g. year selector in Analytics).
  • Spacer and optional back button pinned to the bottom.

SRP: Only responsible for sidebar layout assembly.

OCP: Callers supply their own NavEntry lists and optional extras, no modification needed to add new pages.

Time Complexity: O(n) where n = number of nav entries.

Space Complexity: O(n).

  • Method Details

    • build

      public static javafx.scene.layout.VBox build(List<String> styleClasses, String sectionTitle, boolean separatorBefore, List<SidebarBuilder.NavEntry> entries, String activeKey, boolean separatorAfter, javafx.scene.layout.VBox extraContent, String backLabel, String backButtonText, Runnable backAction)
      Builds a complete sidebar VBox.
      Parameters:
      styleClasses - CSS classes to apply to the sidebar root (e.g. "panels", "sidebar")
      sectionTitle - label shown above the nav entries (e.g. "Reports", null to omit)
      entries - list of nav entries
      activeKey - the currently active route key, matching entry gets nav-btn-active
      extraContent - optional VBox inserted below the nav entries (e.g. year selector). Pass null to omit.
      backLabel - label shown above the back button section (e.g. "Return home"). Pass null to omit the back section entirely.
      backAction - what happens when the back button is clicked. Pass null if no back button.
      Returns:
      the fully assembled sidebar VBox

    • buildNavButton

      public static javafx.scene.control.Button buildNavButton(String icon, String text)
      Builds a single nav button with icon + label. Caller adds active/inactive style classes after this returns.

    • SideBarTitle

      public static javafx.scene.layout.VBox SideBarTitle()
